name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union operates a global money transfer and financial services network with locations across the US offering money orders, cash pickup, bill payments, and wire transfers.
description_long:
Western Union is a long-established international money transfer company with an extensive agent network across the United States, including multiple locations in Denver, Colorado and virtually every major city. The company provides consumers with access to financial services through partner retail locations including grocery stores (King Soopers, Safeway), convenience stores (Circle K, 7-Eleven), and pharmacies (Walgreens).

Their primary offerings include sending money domestically and internationally, picking up cash transfers at agent locations, money order services, wire transfers, bill payments, mobile top-ups, and prepaid card services. Customers can initiate transactions online 24/7 through WU.com or complete them in-store during agent operating hours. The platform also offers tracking capabilities, receiver management, and inmate payment services. Some locations specialize exclusively in money order services, as indicated by multiple 7-Eleven and Circle K branches in the Denver area.

Western Union distinguishes itself through its ubiquitous physical presence—150 agent locations appear in the Denver search alone—combined with hybrid online-to-offline service capability. Their 24/7 online initiation with in-store completion flexibility provides convenience for both senders and receivers. The company operates across multiple languages including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese, serving diverse immigrant and multicultural communities.

A critical limitation is that several locations offer only money order services, not full money transfer capabilities, requiring consumers to verify service availability before visiting. Payout limits apply at some locations ($300 maximum at the Walgreens location listed). The reliance on retail partner hours means service availability varies significantly by location and partner.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations in Denver metro area alone, providing convenient physical access
24/7 online transaction initiation through WU.com, though in-store completion depends on agent hours
Multiple multilingual support options (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese) for diverse populations
Diverse partner locations including grocery stores, pharmacies, and convenience stores for accessibility
Integrated services including money transfers, money orders, bill payments, and mobile top-ups in one platform
Transaction tracking and receiver management available online
Money transfer available at many locations with various payout options
cons: Many locations offer money orders only, limiting full-service money transfer availability without verification
Service hours depend entirely on retail partner operating times—not all locations open 24/7 despite online availability
Payout limits at some partner locations ($300 maximum reported at certain Walgreens branches) restrict transaction sizes
No transparency on fees or exchange rates visible from the website location pages
Requires in-person visit to retail agent location for final transaction completion despite online initiation
best_for: Immigrants and multicultural communities needing international money transfers with multilingual support
Consumers seeking convenient money order services at nearby grocery stores or pharmacies
Users who prefer hybrid online-to-offline transactions with 24/7 online initiation capability
Bill payers and mobile top-up users needing multiple financial services at single locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing convenient access to money orders and cash transfers through ubiquitous retail locations, particularly immigrant communities sending money internationally. The primary caveat is verifying that your specific nearby location offers full money transfer services rather than money orders only, and confirming retail partner hours align with your availability.
services: Domestic money transfers with online initiation and in-store pickup
Online account registration and profile management
